title: Shoot animation sync packet + isFiring flag (local + other players) + shootAnimTimer (local zero-delay + server sync + tick decay)
reference_files: C:/Users/GGxia/Desktop/YanbweMod/ModularShoot/设计文档.md#L1346-1363 (Third-person animation design: shootAnimTimer, isFiring, animation sync packet, tick decay)
C:/Users/GGxia/Desktop/YanbweMod/ModularShoot/设计文档.md#L1354-1357 (isFiring flag maintenance: local client detection, other server 2-tick timeout, while_firing texture rule)
acceptance_criteria: ShootAnimS2CPacket record implements CustomPacketPayload: fields = player UUID, isFiring (bool), shootAnimTimer (float)
PlayerShootStateManager: client-side per-player state map (UUID -> {isFiring, shootAnimTimer})
isFiring local player: client detects left-click held + main hand is gun -> true; release or non-gun -> false; zero-delay (same condition as ShootC2SPacket send)
isFiring other players: server maintains per-player 'recently shooting' state (ShootC2SPacket received -> true, 2 tick timeout -> false), syncs via ShootAnimS2CPacket to nearby clients
shootAnimTimer local player: client sets timer to peak (e.g. 5 ticks) immediately on sending ShootC2SPacket (zero-delay animation feedback, no server round-trip)
shootAnimTimer other players: server sets timer to peak during shoot flow step 8 (sound), syncs via ShootAnimS2CPacket
shootAnimTimer tick decay: timer -= 1 each tick, reaches 0 -> animation ends
isFiring is INDEPENDENT from shootAnimTimer (no reuse) - timer peaks briefly and decays, isFiring persists while firing to avoid while_firing flicker
ShootAnimS2CPacket registered in ModularShootPackets via PayloadRegistrar.playToClient
